DECLARATION REGARDING NOTICE AND SERVICE OF REQUEST FOR TEMPORARY EMERGENCY (EX PARTE) ORDERS FILED BY MOTHER CASILLAS, VALENTINA HEARING SET FOR JAN-19-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 404
